final:
module RefModule(
    output Q,
    input CLK,
    input D,
    input DE
);reg Q_reg;

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge CLK or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (DE) begin
            Q_reg <= D;
        end
    end

    assign Q = Q_reg;

endmodule
